title: Create a board from a Google Calendar
excerpt: I have searched for this topic with no luck, but is there a way to create a board from an already created Google Calendar. We have a promotions calendar already started that I would like to import into Monday so I can st…

posts.author: lambchop11179 (Penny)
posts.cookedHtml: I have searched for this topic with no luck, but is there a way to create a board from an already created Google Calendar. We have a promotions calendar already started that I would like to import into Monday so I can start assigning tasks.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @lambchop11179 !

By using Google Calendar’s native monday integration I believe you would not need to visit Google Calendar at all. You could create a calendar view that would function similarly.

image1639×665 75 KB

If that does not work out for you, you could additionally use this App which allows you to embed your Google Calendar on monday.

image516×818 72 KB

Hope this helps!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
